relevance_reason: Address range overlap may create unintended access path to a protected SoC resource.
vulnerable_behavior_summary: Address range overlap may create unintended access path to a protected SoC resource.
expected_safe_behavior_summary: APB address map should assign SPI/UDMA and SoC control to non-overlapping ranges, and the decoder should route each address to one intended target only.
notes: RTL confirmed in periph_bus_defines.sv, periph_bus_wrap.sv, apb_node.sv, soc_peripherals.sv, and udma_subsystem.sv. UDMA/SPI range overlaps SoC control range.
